---
title: "About"
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image: pic1.jpg
  links:
    - icon: bluesky
      text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/miafranco367
---

::: {#hero-heading}
My name is Mia B. Franco. I am a graduate student in Forest Sciences at Colorado State University, Fort Collins. I am studying the longevity of fuel treatments. Outside of my work, I enjoy backpacking, running, and hiking.

## Education

University of California, Berkeley \| Berkeley, CA\
B.S. in Forest Ecology and Management\
B.S. in Society and Environment\
Ecosystem Management and Forestry Minor \| Aug 2021 - December 2024

UC Berkeley Forestry Field Camp \| Meadow Valley, California \| June 2022 - Aug 2022

## Experience

Macrosystems Ecology Laboratory, UC Berkeley \| Research Assistant \| Jan 2024 - Dec 2024

Forest and Woodland Ecology Lab, UC Berkeley \| Laboratory Technician \| Oct 2023 - Dec 2024

Santa Rosa Junior College \| Wildfire Mitigation Force Forest Intern \| Jun 2023 - Aug 2023

California Department of Forestry and Fire Protection (CAL FIRE) \| Forestry Aide \| May 2023 - Aug 2023

Zero Waste Laboratory, UC Berkeley \| Research Assistant \| Jan 2022 - May 2022
:::
